skills.name: Long Range Curler
skills.desc: Allows players to perform Controller Shots with increased accuracy and a heavy curl when far from the goal.

skills.name: Chip Shot Control
skills.desc: Allows players to perform accurate Chip Shots, even while moving at high speed.

skills.name: Knuckle Shot
skills.desc: Allows players to perform Knuckle Shots. To do so, perform a Stunning Shot with 50-60% power.

skills.name: Dipping Shot
skills.desc: Allows players to perform Dipping Shots (65-95% power Stunning Shot).

skills.name: Rising Shot
skills.desc: Allows players to perform Rising Shots (65-95% power Stunning Shot).

skills.name: Long Range Shooting
skills.desc: Boosts the accuracy of shots performed when outside of the box.

skills.name: Acrobatic Finishing
skills.desc: Allows players to finish by performing acrobatic volleys/shots.

skills.name: One-time Shot
skills.desc: Improves a player’s ability to perform one-time shots.

skills.name: Penalty Specialist
skills.desc: Improves the accuracy of penalty kicks.

skills.name: Heel Trick
skills.desc: Allows players to perform heel passes.

skills.name: One Touch Pass
skills.desc: Improves the power and precision of one-time passes.

skills.name: Through Passing
skills.desc: Allows players to perform more precise through passes. Also boosts the success rate of those featuring tricky trajectories.

skills.name: Weighted Pass
skills.desc: Allows players to perform lofted and fly-through passes with heavy backspins.

skills.name: Pinpoint Crossing
skills.desc: Allows players to perform sharper/more accurate crosses.

skills.name: Outside Curler
skills.desc: Players with the skill can perform precise outside spinning shots and passes, no matter the range.

skills.name: Rabona
skills.desc: Allows players to perform rabona passes/shots.

skills.name: No Look Pass
skills.desc: Allows players to perform no-look passes.

skills.name: Low Lofted Pass
skills.desc: Allows players to perform low-trajectory lofted passes, no matter the distance.

skills.name: Scissors Feint
skills.desc: Increases the speed of Scissor Feints.

skills.name: Double Touch
skills.desc: Increases the speed of Double Touches.

skills.name: Flip Flap
skills.desc: Allows players to perform the Flip Flap (aka the Elastico).

skills.name: Merseille Turn
skills.desc: Increases the speed of Merseille Turns.

skills.name: Sombrero
skills.desc: Allows players to perform both Flick and Sombrero Turns when tapping the ball. Increases the accuracy of flicks.

skills.name: Chop Turn
skills.desc: Allows players to perform faster Chop Turn dribbles.

skills.name: Cut Behind & Turn
skills.desc: Allows players to perform a Cut Behind with a special tapping motion.

skills.name: Inside Bounce
skills.desc: Allows players to perform Inside Bounces.

skills.name: Sole Control
skills.desc: Players with the skill can perform faster and more precise feints/turns.

skills.name: Weighted Pass
skills.desc: Allows players to perform lofted and fly-through passes with heavy backspins.

skills.name: Man Marking
skills.desc: Makes players harder to get rid of when man marking, while also improving their reaction speed.

skills.name: Track Back
skills.desc: Improves a player’s ability to apply aggressive pressure.

skills.name: Interception
skills.desc: Boosts your player’s ability to react and intercept passes.

skills.name: Blocker
skills.desc: Limits the number of rebounds and boosts a player’s ability to react to/block passes.

skills.name: Aerial Superiority
skills.desc: Boosts a player’s ability to win aerial duels.

skills.name: Sliding Tackle
skills.desc: Boosts the speed and accuracy of sliding tackles. Your player will also win the ball more often.

skills.name: Acrobatic Clearance
skills.desc: Allows players to clear the ball with their feet, even when out of balance or in the air.

skills.name: Heading
skills.desc: Improves the accuracy of headers. Players with the skill also perform downward headers more often.

skills.name: Long Throws
skills.desc: Allows players to perform longer throws.

skills.name: Gamesmanship
skills.desc: Allows players to win fouls more easily when in possession.

skills.name: Aerial Superiority
skills.desc: Boosts a player’s ability to win aerial duels.

skills.name: Captaincy
skills.desc: Allows your player to reduce the whole team’s fatigue.

skills.name: Super-Sub
skills.desc: Boosts a player’s overall ability after being subbed in on the second half.

skills.name: Fighting Spirit
skills.desc: Players with the skill will lose less kicking/heading accuracy while under pressure. Also reduces fatigue effects.

skills.name: GK High Punt
skills.desc: Allows players to perform more accurate high-trajectory punt kicks.

skills.name: GK Low Punt
skills.desc: Allows players to perform more accurate low-trajectory punt kicks.

skills.name: GK Long Throws
skills.desc: Improves the distance of throws.

skills.name: GK Penalty Saver
skills.desc: Boosts goalkeeping reactions against penalty kicks.

skills.name: Aerial Fort
skills.desc: Further boosts your aerial prowess.

skills.name: Acceleration Burst
skills.desc: Allows players to get a higher acceleration boost off the dribble.

skills.name: Attack Trigger (NEW)
skills.desc: Allows players to increase the Attacking Awareness of all teammates when with the ball.

skills.name: Blitz Curler
skills.desc: Adds more accuracy and an ever-sharper curve to Controlled Shots (50%+ power).

skills.name: Bullet Header
skills.desc: Boosts the accuracy and power of headers.

skills.name: Edged Crossing
skills.desc: Boosts the accuracy of crosses.

skills.name: Fortress
skills.desc: Increases a player’s defensive and physical performance if leading at the start of the second half.

skills.name: Game-Changing Pass
skills.desc: Boosts the accuracy of passes if losing at halftime.

skills.name: GK Directing Defense
skills.desc: Increases the defensive abilities of your defenders.

skills.name: GK Spirit Roar
skills.desc: Boosts the physicality of your defenders.

skills.name: Long Reach Tackle
skills.desc: Massively improves a player’s range and success rate when performing standing tackles.

skills.name: Low Screamer
skills.desc: Allows players to perform powerful low screamers. To do so, perform a Stunning Shot with under 50% power.

skills.name: Magnetic Feet
skills.desc: Increases your player’s ability to keep control of the ball while heavily marked.

skills.name: Momentum Dribbling
skills.desc: Allows players to keep tight control of the ball when dribbling, which translates into faster ball speed and quicker transitions between moves.

skills.name: Phenomenal Finishing
skills.desc: Massively boosts a player’s ability to finish with all shot types.

skills.name: Phenomenal Pass
skills.desc: Boosts the accuracy/speed of all passes.

skills.name: Willpower
skills.desc: Continuously boosts a player’s shooting ability the more shots they take.

skills.name: Visionary Pass
skills.desc: Allows players to temporarily boost the first-time ball control and one-touch shots/passes of receivers following a pass.
